rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEANDRUS BENTON SR, DECEASED SEPTEMBER 9, 2010
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order To Enforce Court Mediated Release For Gayle Benton Martin To Clear Title And Execute All Documents To Sell Real Property Of The Leandrus Benton Sr Trust And Distribute Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: continued to june 5, 2017. examiner notes objections waiting to be filed. continuance required to allow time for the examiner to receive and review a file stamped copy of those objections and any reply filed (file stamped copy of the reply, if any, must be received no later than thursday, june 1, 2017 to avoid another automatic continuance). the examiner notes the petition requests two forms of relief that are not in the caption or on the Notice of Hearing, so those two requests cannot be considered unless an amendment to the petition is filed and properly noticed (request to remove trustee, and request for forfeiture of trustee's share). no further continuance will be granted without an appearance.
